personal.name: Joy Chattopadhyay
personal.title: Senior Cloud Engineer
personal.bio:
AIOps-focused engineer with strong expertise in developing system prompts for intelligent automation. Passionate
about leveraging AI to enhance DevOps workflows. Proven track record in designing cost-effective, scalable solutions,
implementing robust CI/CD pipelines, and managing Kubernetes-based microservices in production environments.
Committed to continuous learning and ongoing skill development to stay at the forefront of emerging technologies
and industry best practices.

experience.description: As a Senior Cloud Engineer specializing in modern, high-performance cloud architectures, DevOps automation, and AI/LLM infrastructure. I bridge the gap between heavy software engineering and robust system operations—scaling containerized environments, optimizing massive data pipelines, and provisioning specialized GPU clusters for AI workloads. Focused on maximizing reliability and efficiency on [AWS/Azure/GCP], I design automated, secure environments that enable engineering teams to deploy both traditional cloud services and cutting-edge generative AI applications at scale.
responsibilities: Assist organizations transition from legacy systems to modern, cloud-native architectures that are fast, secure, and cost-effective.
Cloud Architecture & Migration: Designing fault-tolerant, multi-region architectures on [AWS/Azure/GCP] and migrating complex workloads with zero downtime.
Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Eliminating manual configuration by treating infrastructure as software using Terraform and Ansible.
DevOps & CI/CD: Engineering automated deployment pipelines (GitHub Actions / Jenkins) to accelerate release cycles and improve code quality.
Containerization & Orchestration: Scaling microservices efficiently using Docker and Kubernetes.
Security & FinOps: Implementing strict IAM policies, network security, and continuous cost-optimization strategies to maximize ROI.

experience.description: As cloud engineer I designs, implements, and manages cloud-based systems, ensuring they are scalable, secure, and cost-effective. Responsibilities include cloud architecture design, deployment, security, cost management, automation, performance monitoring, disaster recovery, and support. I collaborate with development teams, provide technical support, and create documentation. Key skills include proficiency with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), infrastructure as code, containerization, and CI/CD tools. Strong problem-solving, communication, and continuous learning are essential.
responsibilities: Architected and deployed secure, scalable, and high-performance cloud infrastructure across [AWS/Azure/GCP], improving system reliability to 99.99% uptime.
Spearheaded the migration of legacy on-premises applications to a cloud-native microservices architecture using Docker and Kubernetes.
Designed and maintained Terraform scripts to manage Infrastructure as Code (IaC), reducing environment provisioning time by X%.
Built and optimized automated CI/CD pipelines, cutting deployment times down from hours to minutes.
Implemented proactive monitoring and observability solutions (Prometheus / Grafana / Datadog), reducing incident response times by X%.
Mentored and guided junior engineers, fostering DevOps best practices across cross-functional development teams.

experience.description: I have Worked on dockerizing the web apps. - Experience in AWS technologies such as EC2, ECR, EKS, S3, IAM, VPC, Load Balancer, CloudWatch, EFS, EBS, Route 53, ECS. - Maintain cloud infrastructure from Terraform, Custom Terraform Modules. - Branching stratergies for multiple environments and workflows. - Experience in to create VPC for infrastructure Private, Public subnets as well as vpc peering. - Have good knowledge of Services in K8s Like Cluster IP, Node-Port, Loadbalancer, ingress etc. - Hands on experience on AWS and GCP. - Experience on Various tools which included build tools like : Continuous Integration tools Jenkins and servers Apache nginx. - I have a knowledge on Devesecops Tools like Checkov. - I have a strong background in cloud infrastructure, automation, and containerization. - Experience in GCP such as Google Kubernetes Engine, App engine. - Pipeline configuration on Jenkins and spinnaker. - Good Knowledge of Linux and windows operating system. - Have Knowledge on Jira ticketing issues and Bitbucket repository management.
responsibilities: 1. Cloud Deployment & Configuration
App Deployment: Deploying and configuring applications onto cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) using virtual machines, containers, or serverless architectures.
Resource Provisioning: Setting up cloud resources such as storage buckets, databases, and compute instances based on pre-defined templates or blueprints.
2. Operations & Monitoring
System Health Checks: Monitoring cloud infrastructure health, performance, and availability using tools like AWS CloudWatch, Azure Monitor, or Google Cloud Monitoring.
Incident Response: Troubleshooting basic infrastructure alerts, resolving routine technical issues, and escalating complex problems to senior engineers.
Backup Management: Configuring and verifying regular data backups and assisting with routine disaster recovery drills.
3. Security & Access Management
Identity & Access Management (IAM): Managing user permissions, roles, and access groups following the principle of least privilege.
Network Maintenance: Configuring and maintaining basic network components like Virtual Private Clouds (VPCs), subnets, and security groups/firewalls.
4. Collaboration & Documentation
Team Support: Assisting developers with environment setups and minor pipeline fixes.
Documentation: Keeping internal knowledge bases up to date with configuration steps, infrastructure maps, and troubleshooting guides.

experience.description: I have experience with operating systems such as Windows and Linux, as well as with DevOps tools including Atlassian Jira, Bitbucket, Confluence, Git, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Spinnaker, Terraform, and SonarQube. I have worked with cloud services like Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and Amazon Web Service (AWS) and have experience with scripting languages like Golang and Shell-Script. I am skilled in working with databases such as MySQL and monitoring tools like Grafana, Prometheus, and AWS CloudWatch. I also have experience with web technology, including Apache web server.
responsibilities: Deploy and manage cloud infrastructure and microservices across AWS and GCP, utilizing core services like EC2, S3, and Google Compute Engine.
Containerize applications using Docker and manage orchestrations and deployments within Kubernetes clusters.
Maintain and optimize automated CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Spinnaker to streamline continuous integration and delivery.
Write and maintain modular Infrastructure as Code (IaC) templates using Terraform to provision repeatable cloud environments.
Develop automation and utility scripts using Shell-Script and Golang to eliminate repetitive operational tasks.
Configure and manage application and system health monitoring dashboards using Prometheus, Grafana, and AWS CloudWatch.
Set up, manage, and optimize relational databases using MySQL to ensure data availability and performance.
Configure, secure, and maintain Apache web servers to ensure reliable hosting of web technologies.
Integrate SonarQube into development pipelines to enforce code quality, security scanning, and static analysis standards.
Manage source code versioning, branching strategies, and code reviews using Git and Bitbucket.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, track sprint progress, and document infrastructure setups using Atlassian Jira and Confluence.
Administer, troubleshoot, and maintain core system operations across both Linux and Windows operating systems.

experience.description: I have experience creating, packaging, and updating applications using Helm Charts, and I have worked on fixing Docker image vulnerabilities. I have a solid knowledge of Terraform for IaC creation for AWS and GCP resources, and I am skilled in Docker and Kubernetes for hosting microservices. I am proficient in shell scripting to automate manual tasks and have experience with Jira ticketing issues and Bitbucket repository management. I have also knowledge on asset management.
responsibilities: Author, package, and update complex Kubernetes applications using Helm Charts to simplify cloud-native deployments.
Scan, identify, and remediate security vulnerabilities within Docker images to ensure secure production environments.
Design, provision, and manage repeatable cloud resources across AWS and GCP using Terraform for Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
Containerize enterprise microservices with Docker and manage their orchestration, scaling, and hosting within Kubernetes.
Write robust Shell scripts to automate repetitive operational workflows and minimize manual intervention.
Streamline source code management, pull requests, and version control workflows using Bitbucket repositories.
Manage, track, and resolve infrastructure and deployment tasks efficiently using the Jira ticketing system.
Maintain strict lifecycle tracking, compliance, and governance of software and hardware inventory through IT asset management practices.

projects.title: OweMates: Seamless Expense Sharing
projects.description:
The Problem: Tracking shared expenses for trips, apartments, or group dinners often leads to messy spreadsheets, awkward conversations, and complex "who owes who" math.

The Solution: OweMates is a centralized expense-sharing application that simplifies group finances. Users can easily create groups, log shared expenses, and instantly see a simplified breakdown of balances. By optimizing the debt settlement algorithm, OweMates minimizes the number of transactions needed to settle up.
highlights: Custom expense splitting (equal, exact amounts, percentages)
Activity dashboard with real-time balance updates
Debt simplification algorithm to minimize total transactions
